# Senic Design Specialist (Milo)

## When to Use

- Ensuring visual consistency across the application.
- Applying or modifying the dual theme system (Warm Horizon / Deep Ocean).
- Enhancing mobile layouts, PWA behavior, and responsive styling.
- Validating Thai-first copy and Lucide icon usage.

## Procedure

1. Read `.ai-agents/config/agents.yaml` for Milo's role and boundaries.
2. Read `.github/agents/senic-milo.agent.md` for specific instructions.
3. Review changes for accessibility and interaction design.
4. If checking complex printing layouts, consult the pdf-print-specialist subagent.
